name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Calling on Scott Jensen
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=1)
---
Peter \-- You know the joke that, at times, seems all too real: how do you know a politician is lying? Their lips are moving! **Last May, the legislative session was winding down while Governor Walz' tyrannical orders were still in place. Our beloved small businesses were under a shutdown and people could not attend their churches. Fearing we'd enter the summer without any reprieve from these abusive powers, we demanded the Republican controlled Senate pass the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution.** If you aren't aware, the Constitution of Minnesota required the Legislature to finish business by May 18th. After that, they could only be called back for a Special Session at the request of the Governor. So as the final weekend approached, we called then Senator Scott Jensen to make a motion on the Senate floor to get a vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution.
## Guess what he did?
Instead of taking the courageous stance and forcing the vote on the Senate floor, he took the issue to a private caucus meeting, where Senator Gazelka decided to kill it. Jensen could have fought for us and forced a vote, rather than bow to Party leadership. But he was apparently too worried about putting his colleagues (aka politicians) on record, which would've exposed them for the whole public to see. As you can see, he took NO ACTION to force a vote when we needed him the most. Now he's running for governor, whispering sweet nothings in our ear and begging for our votes. But I say we demand action! Scott Jensen has done countless media appearances, been outspoken about the government's COVID response and is officially a candidate for Governor. He's trying to sell himself as the answer for Minnesota. But has he changed? There is only one way to tell if candidates like Scott Jensen, Mike Murphy and anyone else who enters the Governor race are serious and willing to put pen to paper. They need to PLEDGE TO YOU that they will NEVER AGAIN allow a Governor to abuse Emergency Powers.
##
Do you agree?
Peter, I'm happy to announce that Action 4 Liberty has created the Never Again Pledge and sent it to the candidates for Governor. This pledge gets a public commitment by the candidates that they are serious about Ending Walz' Emergency Powers by calling on the Minnesota Legislature to REFUSE to pass a budget until they End Walz' Emergency Powers. We need to unify in telling Walz if he wants a budget, the Peacetime Emergency must end and he can't ever repeat what he did over the last year, period. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=2) Hey Scott Jensen and others: Show us you aren’t all talk. Prove to us that you mean business. Sign the Pledge to make the [**Never Again Bill**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=3) your top priority as governor. Pledge to us that you are committed to restoring our Republic. Give us your word that, if elected, you won’t abuse the power of the office. The **Never Again Bill** would put the Governor in jail if he violated our rights again. There’s no better guarantee that you are on our side than making this your number one priority! You see, we need action from these candidates. Simply flapping their gums isn't going to cut it anymore. Here at Action 4 Liberty, we work to cut through the smoke and mirrors that these politicians try peddling to us. And that's why this pledge is so important. It separates the serious players from the pretenders! Scott Jensen and all other candidates will have the better part of the week to review and sign the Pledge before we post their response for the world to see. It's time politicians get SERIOUS about making sure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! If they sign the pledge, that will be a mere indication they are at least somewhat serious about Ending Emergency Powers. However, we'll be watching them closely for double-speak and actions that prove otherwise. We'll post it here on Thursday evening:
# [NEVER AGAIN PLEDGE WEBSITE](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=4)
## Update on Field Operations.
Our doorknocking team continues to grow in both numbers of people and effectiveness. They were able to get this much lit in the hands of voters in three legislative districts this last week. That's 6,000 pieces of lit! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=5) **I can't thank you enough for supporting this operation. We plan to hire a couple more and will soon be in more districts. If you want to contribute,[please donate today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=6).** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=calling_on_scott_jen&n=9), software for leaders.

subject: New week, same attacks from the left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Friend,

On Sunday, March 21st, the _New York Times_ posted an article claiming I was assaulting the truth. This is all too predictable. In this latest smear, they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say. This isn't journalism, it's advocacy from the left's biggest media ally designed to push their biased narrative in another attempt to cancel and silence me.

Throughout my time in the U.S. Senate, I have worked tirelessly for transparency in government and freedom of speech. I have no intention of allowing the left to use my commitment to telling the truth as a political weapon for their own liberal gain. This manipulative piece from the _New York Times_ once again demonstrates the techniques they use to silence, cancel, and censor strong conservative voices. I will continue to fight for freedom and fight for the truth.

In this fight, I could really use your help. As the left's number one target, they will do and say just about anything to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions to fit their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message.

[**Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q2FgOnfZYTsx4y9EmAvYogJWp1kyVcqPSkz5QgpTnyVVBXj9U8eOl2sbDC67VyCZwl3xM4t7tKICJTYUvEvGHOsO-cwdG-oylT5xrK6PksLmJfUDzQnrJdDA07hbcrKgwvCDwqhCK4z2C846GDARANcRINldxPt2tvF0ma5C8vJ4F2ZWXUjRr4VixYhinBFHGHy9mB5hXPcqXNQDSKNmjjxd0iiMIjs0HjUFDb4EgOsIaS7wMdK9DPkUCFfdFZAhgRTEtWTBqSlDS5ik8NZre3zA8eNJiqZTKSMB1YjF80C3LriiBL_jIuz72okuex6UATNzvJRTlzhSxFzURc-mEoG54OdlBgKqPR164cAWDrfv2rTviWhUtwlJuBE2T7oxF6NbaScfTLkbcxE36HCAu54R0480y4q&c=cWzaXUQHbNkYBIG_2cEejX_29FuL8YmUCuzyXbgjPgftEVVZCmOEvw==&ch=9AP3XRCcXqd7WeyBHxOF_Z3GNvtNvHRY1LwBXVHkHL-s80aI5C0RLA==) will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=jCIzG9pxub8vIic&b=3s59zh0xCKhousBMZf1Uhg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=jCIzG9pxub8vIic&b=3s59zh0xCKhousBMZf1Uhg
- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by liberal Congressman Darren Soto. And I believe in the Constitution!

Let's be clear: the U.S. Constitution ALREADY guarantees equal protections and rights under law. All citizens are treated the same by the law.

Whenever Congress tries to get itself involved in tweaking things the Constitution already has perfect, it never turns out well.

Pelosi is passing absolutely horrific legislation- real "tyranny of the majority" type stuff - including this new "Equality" Act.

Here's a rundown of what the "Equality Act" actually does:

1. Mandates that doctors and hospitals MUST perform abortions regardless of their faith or conscience.

2. Mandates giving gender-altering drugs to 3 and 4 year old children, if they request it. Parents may not object.

3. Creates a new civil rights carveout for "transgender" people, complete with rights no other American gets.

4. Mandates that biological men must be allowed into women's restrooms and onto women's sports teams. So much for women's empowerment!

Pelosi is not wasting her chance to pass radical and nutty legislation. And my opponent, Darren Soto, voted for this heinous, shocking bill.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=jCIzG9pxub8vIic&b=TMnAcKM1GzW5M29uuGik8w

It's beyond anything I ever thought I'd see in America.

Democrats mandating abortions. So much for "choice"!

These people are psychos. Mandating that a child of three years old can demand puberty blocking drugs- which were never approved for use by the FDA- and against their parents' wishes???

Since when does this bill have anything to do with "equality"??? This is an insane left wing boondoggle.

This Act is BLATENTLY UNCONSTITUTIONAL.

For true equality, we must look to the Constitution!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=jCIzG9pxub8vIic&b=3s59zh0xCKhousBMZf1Uhg

The crazy Democrats really want to destroy our country in every way. Nothing is going right- not the border, not race relations, not this gender-bending garbage.... and it's ALL THEIR FAULT.

Now is the time to fix this. We can never trust any Democrat with power again.

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and coming close. This time I'm starting early so I'll have the money to do even better!

Darren Soto voted for this unconstitutional Act. He voted for child abuse. He voted for the government to have more power over our children than parents. He's a monster, and we can beat him.

I am an America First patriot, and I will vote with the Constitution, every time. I spent my life defending it, and I will do so in Congress!

Help me take a stand! We gotta get Pelosi out of there. Canyou help me?

Can I count on you for a donation

I won't ever let them steal another election - with your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=jCIzG9pxub8vIic&b=3s59zh0xCKhousBMZf1Uhg

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Hello Somebody!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need more leaders in Congress who understand the needs of working people — who have lived the struggle themselves and who are dedicated to fighting for justice for ALL of us.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210323-1967-header&t=1&akid=1967%2E2526796%2Exsm1_0)
We need more leaders in Congress who understand the needs of working people — who have lived the struggle themselves and who are dedicated to fighting for justice for ALL of us.
Nina Turner is one of those leaders, and that’s why I’m proud to endorse her campaign to represent Ohio’s 11th Congressional District in Congress. Will you join me in supporting her campaign today?
[Make a donation — of $3 or whatever you can afford right now — to help power Nina Turner to victory and build our progressive coalition in Congress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8427?refcode=em20210323-1967&amounts=3%2C15%2C35%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&t=20&akid=1967%2E2526796%2Exsm1_0)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8427?refcode=em20210323-1967&amounts=3%2C15%2C35%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&t=21&akid=1967%2E2526796%2Exsm1_0)**
Nina Turner is a bold, unapologetic progressive who has spent her entire career advocating for the working people of Northeast Ohio, including on the Cleveland City Council, in the Ohio State Senate, and as National Co-Chair of Senator Bernie Sanders’ 2016 and 2020 presidential campaigns.
Through it all, she has been a powerful voice for progressive values and policies that will make a meaningful difference in the lives of working people — like Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, COVID relief that matches the scale of this crisis, and racial and economic justice for all.
Nina isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Like me, her campaign is powered by the people. But that means the only way Nina Turner is going to win is if lots and lots of people like you get involved.
**[Our movement needs to show up for Nina today. Will you make a contribution to Nina Turner for Congress? 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign so she can organize and get her progressive message out before the OH-11 special election.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8427?refcode=em20210323-1967&amounts=3%2C15%2C35%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&t=22&akid=1967%2E2526796%2Exsm1_0)**
[****](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8427?refcode=em20210323-1967&amounts=3%2C15%2C35%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&t=23&akid=1967%2E2526796%2Exsm1_0)
Your support will help grow The Squad in Congress and allow us to keep building power for racial, economic, social, and environmental justice. Thank you.
Pa’lante,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8427?refcode=em20210323-1967&amounts=3%2C15%2C35%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&t=24&akid=1967%2E2526796%2Exsm1_0)**

body:
Democrats’ silence over the crisis at our southern border is deafening.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470342?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-crisis-032321?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_border_crisis_032321&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=de29f755e7&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican,

The massive influx of illegal migrants at our southern border is a crisis. It’s not a “small dilemma” or a “tough situation” or a problem to “circle back to.” It’s a self-inflicted wound, the byproduct of Joe Biden’s campaign promises to open our borders and grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens.

Take it from Mexican President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador: “They see him (Joe Biden) as the migrant President, and so many feel they’re going to reach the United States.”
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-crisis-032321?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_border_crisis_032321&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=de29f755e7&mc_eid=UNIQID

After years of smearing President Trump’s immigration policies that put America First, the Democrats and their media allies strangely have nothing to say about the lawless chaos happening right now along the southern border. Their silence is deafening.

On his first day in office, Joe Biden moved to stop construction on the border wall. He then laid out a detailed plan to provide amnesty for millions of illegal immigrants already in the country, prevented ICE agents from doing their jobs, and reimplemented the disastrous “catch and release” policy.

The left slammed President Trump his entire Presidency for border policies that protected Americans from criminals and drug cartels who used children for their crimes, but now that Joe Biden is in the Oval Office, we are facing the biggest border crisis in modern history.

We stand for the principle that border security is national security, and with each passing day, the situation at the border is becoming more and more dangerous for American citizens.

Please chip in what you can right now to send a message that we want our secure borders back!
CHIP IN NOW FOR BORDER SECURITY >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-crisis-032321?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_border_crisis_032321&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=de29f755e7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

America is a land of immigrants, and we welcome people from all over the world who desire a chance to achieve their own American Dream. However, we have immigration LAWS for a reason. And Joe Biden refuses to enforce the laws on the books. This is why it’s so important to elect Republican leaders who will secure our borders and get this situation under control.

And let’s call what’s happening at the border what it is: Biden’s Border Crisis.

– Team IN GOP

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Help Expose the FBI’s Secret Database
body:
I wasn’t notified. I don’t know why it happened. I don’t even know when it happened.
---
I shot you a text message yesterday right before I was scheduled to speak before the Florida Legislature.
| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/wWzcmKFFzFWQ6yvddS2Et75nO5THjh4xzq_CD2uDGAfYzC15QW4ViJq9ZRXwBFh9Ss5uD-n8l66GooHOTPMiL2ns_73hfgo5-HC59YrFoiAUB-A2a8UDM-ZH1aniYqYYHlI1ABf8Db3L1k_WbP2GW8Xui9DfjzoDlSMYu5IawUiAKAJ9_oQUwG2M2uNy7Ct2ZOYcwujoF3Hj9oaa2bXd-H2YW15ftxamfC_RQzxV2vTyZBE_jdbhDX6liSCrUaVjF2GAuVxUGac2bePqwLzMGHcCvpWQI-jxuSG5mA) I wasn’t notified.

I don’t know why it happened.

I don’t even know when it happened.

**But the Federal Government stripped me of my gun rights.**

[**Help me get them back.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/5PfOaKussJdgGGucaaNoG1IKhi4yq0tMsMAb-nj6rNxLMrclCRuNd2wH92RwbOY7SQEOd57BgdCHoTucSwfVBCk1sYTickNG3c2bSvDcVTpVNznarLAF931wZzyaThHyZzxNDHOBZVGwTN2gX5hMe0rZ7iYbU_PYnk1ASE-xoOVPDhMpg3AHIJYq8wZ1jcjB872G44tpf5Wo5wnqm2jeA5VTu0QnsAlkDtgVK6D_xl6bg09JrPYH1etMmCpw-i1NDQBwZRJKDcLx965kjsrfctCQxcXe_Qz7itxd3g)

In 2019, I applied for a concealed carry permit in Florida.

As the most-banned woman in the world and an active target of Antifa and the Lunatic Left, I have more than enough reasons to protect myself.

My application was denied, and after a lot of bureaucratic back and forth, I was informed that my name is in the NICS database (the National Instant Background Check System).

Now, I’ve never been convicted of felony, I’m not a fugitive from justice, not a drug user, etc., etc., etc.

There are 12 reasons for a denial in NICS – and I’m all clear on 11 of them.

But there’s a 12th category called the “Federally Denied Persons File.”

And from what I’ve learned, if you upset a bureaucrat or a powerful person, you can end up on that file without notice.

**In 2018, I confronted former FBI Director James Comey.

Today, I can’t purchase or even possess a firearm because I’m in the FBI’s NICS database.**
[**Help me get my 2nd Amendment rights back by donating to cover the legal fees today.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/wL37PIMYPznkcBeCapl6PNsaFOIHLS_zixTsy63DQ27zd7M3YDQ6Qrr3b2iaQAEyoUKU6WPTuSgDJiB9e-30CVEJzBQIN2mbMUR1BvqqhIUgZ0BQwQfegzAUf7rf-d9CDS1lQLv-tID08w6U7uqQOCtS6-vxtSNSzdbG4XOd_BdPwxR7RSSUbEjBfbk3kHSkY3-H9BDnMXVUdnIsYKYX3pB9otqa-PTVPSQYt8BgiL6e5WNlqc8YhW0AHLQCIw5GDB3KphI9sLmW4f-6yCPiBv7NqAtumjr-6nrxjw)

Since this happened to me, I’ve been tracking the NICS database that’s controlled by the FBI.

This year alone, 23,926 people have been stopped from purchasing a firearm because they were denied by NICS.

Just in February of this year, 100,322 people were added to the database – and that doesn’t include the mysterious “Federally Denied Persons File”.

There are 23.4 MILLION names in the NICS database under eleven categories.

That’s 7% of the US population that’s been stripped of their 2nd Amendment Rights!

And again, that doesn’t include the FBI’s secret list – that secret 12th category for denial.

While I desperately need to restore my right to defend myself, I want to expose the “Federally Denied Persons File” in court.

[**Help me do that today by helping me cover my attorney’s fees.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/pj1IEhotQkLL-3VcjS8XbVSo0RKSWJUx50PV0c4mXs_3kRgoiJwVX8Alx6HG_lSyWhDxfsjZXQvCJuCyahtIMul7z76ke4Qz0xJSrzxUmzIF6QQMbr4BJZufHr-Q7NOCEt9AhJIllKPgWLRqb4wT1rXlCpFNrG4GPyvzOxbDgiK8vwQBv-xrFU2lRTDxLzG8nEpKQFhfUgmdWk5J7S5LgVnd2aaA3KDYn_B50cXTxhPWOzUlLZpoV4_cvinO67M6tRLVwi4e11q7j4nBCl9Pkpp6XDVNbN03Z-cKng)

The Democrat-controlled House has already passed two gun control bills within the last few weeks.

The main premise of those bills is to give the FBI MUCH more time to run your name through their database – along with giving them more time to investigate Americans.

I’m 100% confident that I’m in that database because of my political activism, and I’m not the only one it’s happened to.

My friend James O’Keefe had his gun rights stripped – and he had to fight in court to get them back.

Now, I’m doing the same with the **intent to expose a corrupt system**.

[**Help me restore my rights while uncovering the “Federally Denied Persons File” by donating today.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/DJsVYqjGV65PpqZNeFS2Ul6hBvxFQ7qiaPSGLaQXwcpPf2yO9Ze0n4SdtFV09OomC5PaUKpfw-09HApk6j3oeDZMZM7NnYE_EdGXsvgZBeN7MmOFWuuHSNn8FhaOfzDEelEXP6kgpTdsr4BymmSdmPXnMyTcFEYm0kNv-fARWBj1UAaUt9OtMtijRBTaZQhL8WWm2gNP4suRCgvLMUGTk76AAtPa9TYQ6b7nMHbVm6OHN3llJOwy9LIceYaNu72OZSzFrNQc5HGsvvKflvVOOhmo_dI3K5i747SVKw)

I have the best 2nd Amendment attorney in the nation on standby and all I have to do is raise enough money to start the process and lawsuit.

[**Donate whatever you can today and help protect all of our rights.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/JFot_BKiTQNO_Dxmt0uIIOW24AHDXjumKdlHHbIR1AtcwvDS0IrF725f_U7qkBNWUyp-6GpqgFfO3DzfOo7Mf97uS5wmd6wnFM2qUlLFodZKd-pehqNZcMeJYH1txfriWrjQgfNwg483jm1I_-1TwxW_1m99rwji7o57xDMz4wqnbub_FCoucQ_-3L9XiMBxUscPxS4lcdGrNCyDh1VczkqM67AyVBZILGnXjbSXZDR1CvdN_dw9CpI2cYUB5yilcZE1aOZcFQ5gCeRiMj3ix4Zb9lUUILdm_r63Kw)

Thanks for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: See my interviews on Fox News regarding the border crisis and why the Democrats' COVID-19 hypocrisy will hurt them in the 2022 elections
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e6ed3f2d5462/happy-thanksgiving-from-milwaukee-4655106?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope you are doing well and staying safe! The crisis on our southern border is growing worse by the day and President Biden and Vice-President Harris refuse to visit. Why? _Because they don't want the White House press and other reporters exposing what we know is directly attributable to President Biden and the Democrats' failed open border policies. _

Within hours of being sworn in, President Biden signed no fewer than **five executive orders** reversing Trump’s policies including stopping construction of the wall, resurrecting the Obama era ‘Catch and Release’ program and doing away with the ‘Remain in Mexico’ policy. Despite encouraging these migrant youth to trek to our southern border, he never had a plan in place to handle this predictable emergency, and yes, this ‘crisis’ that has quickly become a 'black eye' for the Biden administration. **As a reminder, President Trump never restricted the media to tour facilities for separated children even at its peak in 2018. **

**As a legal immigrant, what frustrates me is that as the emergency on our southern border worsens by the hour, Congressional Democrats just passed last week two bills that would grant amnesty to some four million undocumented illegals.** On the very same day that the White House encouraged a ‘yes’ vote on these bills, President Joe Biden took to national television to proclaim that migrants should not come to our southern border. Not surprisingly, this is the same **Obama open border policy talk we heard in 2015 **that resulted in a humanitarian crisis at our southern border by incentivizing a massive wave of child trafficking. Instead of getting the better life they were promised, Guatamalan children were exploited and forced into labor camps in Ohio under the threat of physical harm. Two adults received prison sentences for these crimes.

---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5faa734676&e=c2296cffff "Amanda on Neil Cavuto.mp4")
---
Fox News’ _Your World_ on March 22, 2021
|
**What should frustrate every American is the failure of any coherent strategy on addressing immigration policy.**
Under Democrat leadership, legal immigrants like me and my family, get a **slap in the face** for abiding by U.S. laws that require waiting as long as two decades, spending tens of thousands of dollars in legal fees while contributing back into the system and paying our taxes. Yet those who make the decision to skip the line and come here illegally **don’t even get a slap on the wrist**. They never pay one red cent into the system and ironically if the Democrats get what they want, illegals may become U.S. citizens faster than we did and without ever contributing back or paying income taxesIf we are nothing, we are a country of laws,

**As a lawyer, and as someone who waited my turn, I applaud President Trump for his defense of our borders and ensuring that our laws were complied with.** As much as he may be loathe to do it, President Biden should finish completing the wall, in addition to stopping ‘Catch and Relase’ and requiring that migrants abide by the ‘Remain in Mexico’ policy until their immigration hearing. Failure to do so will prove what Trump said in his press release; “The Biden Administration has turned a national triumph into a national disaster.”

**Lastly, on the topic of the Democrats COVID-19 hypocrisy and whether it will affect them at the ballot box next year,** see my interview where we discuss where this all started, with a 'Maskless Pelosi' getting her hair done when the entire state of California was shut down and was followed by Democrat Mayors and Governors telling their constituents over the holidays to not travel and to not gather when they did just the same themselves - do as I say, not as I do!
---

Amanda Makki

| | Friend, The pandemic has been difficult for everyone, but some Minnesotans have been hit harder than others. Every two years it is the Legislature's responsibility to come together and pass a budget. Today, House DFLers unveiled the framework for what the next two years should look like. Most importantly, we have to make sure our budget helps Minnesotans survive the pandemic and then thrive once it's behind us. Our budget prioritizes progressive change in a number of areas including:
* Significant increases in funding for E-12 education and child care, making new, ongoing investments after a difficult year of remote learning.
* Support for those who have been most impacted by COVID-19: students, families, and small businesses.
* Investments to improve economic security, including paid family leave, earned sick and safe time, affordable housing, and worker protection and support.
* Progressive, sustainable revenue from the biggest corporations and wealthiest individuals who've fared well during the pandemic in order to make these investments.

House DFLers represent people of all backgrounds and geographies and we carry that with us as we put real solutions on the table to improve the lives of all Minnesotans. We face an opposing point of view from the Republican-controlled Senate, but a bipartisan budget agreement is possible. Together, we have to ensure that Minnesota is a state where everyone has economic security and opportunities to succeed. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives **P.S. name: Ibraheem Samirah
subject: Now is the time for bold action on gun reform.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the NRA have hid behind “thoughts and prayers” without committing to any sort of concrete action
body:
Yesterday’s tragic mass shooting in Boulder, Colorado is yet another dark chapter in our nation’s battle against the gun violence epidemic that has decimated our country for far too long.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26648031/277615364/-1001649105?refcode=210318_cnn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTUxN2NlMS0yYThjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXjJRREr_saNyads1wATYzI0ii7RaEBV9AMx9NXEXK4=) Derek, Yesterday’s tragic mass shooting in Boulder, Colorado is yet another dark chapter in our nation’s battle against the gun violence epidemic that has decimated our country for far too long. Yet again we are left wondering: How many times do we have to say it is enough? How many more lives will it take before we all acknowledge how much of a problem this is? We don’t have to live like this. We must do better.**We CAN do better.** While I’m proud of the strides we have made so far in combatting gun violence here in Virginia, there’s no question that there’s still so much work left in front of us. **I’m committed to supporting these common-sense reforms that can preserve the right to gun ownership while making historic progress on curbing gun violence in Virginia. These reforms include:**
* **A ban on assault-style weapons that are frequently used in mass murders for both civilian and law enforcement use.**
* **A ban on high capacity magazines, bump stocks, and silencers.**
* **Meaningful waiting periods for firearm purchases beyond 5 days.**
* **Closing the Gunshow Loophole when it comes to background checks on gun transfers.**
* **Closing the Boyfriend Loophole when it comes to domestic violence related protect orders.**

These measures alone would go such a far way in helping us solve this public health crisis -- and the time to act is NOW. No person in Alabama history has successfully carried the Republican banner in general elections against Socialist Democrats more times than I have. I have:

clean_body: New information reveals FBI subterfuge in Flynn case [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [==] FBI had doubts about Russia informant's allegation that helped prompt Mike Flynn probe [==] Source: Just the News [==] Five days before the FBI opened the Michael Flynn probe in 2016, a confidential informant alleged to agents that Trump's national security adviser had left a 2014 foreign meeting alone with a Russian woman. Agents ultimately deemed the account "not plausible" and "not accurate" but proceeded to investigate Flynn anyway, newly declassified documents show. [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2020-05-20 The Corrupt Spygate Targeting of Lt. Gen. Flynn Exposed [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Newly obtained documents from Judicial Watch’s litigation with the Department of Defense have exposed important details on the “fraudulent spy operation” aimed at General Flynn. Despite coming to the conclusion that “the FBI had no viable case” to frame Flynn, recently released emails reveal how Peter Strzok and top FBI leadership “intervened to keep the case open.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [==] 2020-07-21 Judicial Watch Sues for Records about Obama Oval Office Meeting on Targeting General Flynn [==] Source: Judicial Watch [==] “Obama’s infamous January 5, 2017, Oval Office meeting is a key moment in the corrupt effort to smear and spy on President Trump and target General Flynn with a malicious prosecution,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “Rather than delay and stonewall, it is urgent the FBI, DOJ, ODNI release all records about this malicious, seditious conspiracy.” [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] [180x150x3] [==] 2020-09-29 New FBI Texts Expose The FBI’s Political Targeting [==] Source: Judicial Watch [==] Investigations into the FBI’s Flynn ‘investigation’, have revealed, in Tom Fitton’s words, that the FBI “wanted a scalp and that they were willing to go after Flynn improperly to get it.” As General Flynn fights to get his case dismissed, new FBI text messages have provided further evidence of the “underlying corruption involved in targeting him improperly.” [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [==] [32x32x2] [==] [32x32x3] [==] [32x32x3] [=] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [==] |

body:
From Biden’s Executive Orders to Pelosi’s 1.9 trillion-dollar liberal payoff, Washington is further off track than ever before... | | |
---
| |
---
| Friends,
The American Dream is under attack. From Biden’s Executive Orders to Pelosi’s 1.9 trillion-dollar liberal payoff, Washington is further off track than ever before. _The Democrats are mortgaging the future of our great nation for generations to come._

The politics of the democrats are threatening our democracy. Where bipartisanship used to exist now only a bitter fight for the direction of the country. _Democrats have said publicly – several times – that the 1.9 trillion-dollar legislation they passed is, “the most progressive legislation in decades.”_

That progressive legislation, that was supposed to be “COVID-19 relief,” cost every man, woman, and child $5,700 dollars. Only 9% of the money went to COVID-19 relief and the rest went to Schumer and Pelosi’s liberal wish list.

This madness has to stop and stop fast. I did not run for office so I could be the caretaker in the slow demise of our great nation. I ran so I could work every day to make it better. I have four kids and I want them to have the same opportunities I had, and my parents before me had. There is no reason we have to continue down this broken road. We must do better.

Please help me fight by supporting my political efforts. I am doing everything I can in Congress to stop the liberal agenda. _I am also doing everything I can to make sure Republicans take the majority in 2022._ Your donation today will provide the fuel I need to keep fighting for a better tomorrow.

**Your contribution _before the end of the month_ is very much appreciated so we can have a strong first quarter.** Please [(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=dea9ce8952&e=a9d1410029) to donate. Whether $11,600 (the maximum for a married couple) or $25, please know that your contribution will be greatly appreciated and wisely used.

The challenges facing our nation are great. But our opportunities and potential are even greater – our brightest days are yet to come.

Yours in the fight,
Tracey Mann

P.S. _It is very important that I have a strong first fundraising quarter (there are 8 days left)._ Please [donate here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=410955bf04&e=a9d1410029) today!
